label: Auroraglass Artificery
description: Auroraglass Artificery is a compact manufactorum workshop cut into the bastion’s vitrified-stone substructure, its walls ribbed with grounded copper strakes to bleed off the city’s electrostatic surges. Workbenches of scarred ferrocrete and clamp-rigs line the aisles beneath hooded lumen arrays filtered to a dull violet, preserving night-vision and reducing auroral flare reflection. A sealed vent manifold and ash-trap grates keep abrasive stormfall dust from fouling precision lathes, solder cradles, and calibration frames. Vox-suppression baffles and thick data-conduit trunks reflect the Nocturnis Bastion’s constant interference, prioritizing hardline diagnostics over open transmission.
